_comment: BLS CPI annual averages (period M13), U.S. city average, all urban consumers, not seasonally adjusted. Values verified against the BLS cu.data flat files (download.bls.gov/pub/time.series/cu/) as mirrored verbatim by the palewire `cpi` package v2.0.10; canonical lookup https://data.bls.gov/timeseries/<SERIES_ID>. 2016-2024 all-items values match BLS-published figures exactly; 2025 is the full-year annual average.
lessons_note: Closest CPI proxy for youth-sports fees; not charted (kept to two benchmark lines) but cited in the analysis.
